requirement_topic.en: UAE Conformity Assessment Scope for BESS Components
requirement_topic.zh: 阿联酋BESS组件合格评定适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: 阿聯酋BESS組件合格評定適用範圍

summary.en: UAE product conformity assessment is administered federally by the Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology, which absorbed the former ESMA standards and conformity functions. For a stationary BESS, the practical compliance task is to confirm whether each imported battery, inverter, charger, control, enclosure, cable, or other electrical subassembly is a regulated product requiring an Emirates conformity route. UAE Cabinet Decision No. 10 of 2020 is understood here as the Control System for Solar Products, and a web check did not confirm that it mandates certification for complete stationary or containerized BESS units as such. A blanket mandatory whole-unit certificate for every stationary BESS configuration should not be assumed unless MoIAT or the applicable emirate authority confirms the exact scope.
summary.zh: 阿联酋产品合格评定由工业和先进技术部在联邦层面管理，该部承接原ESMA标准和合格评定职能。对于固定式BESS，实际合规工作是确认每个进口电池、逆变器、充电器、控制器、外壳、电缆或其他电气子组件是否属于需要阿联酋合格评定路径的受管产品。本条将阿联酋内阁决定2020年第10号理解为《太阳能产品控制体系》；经网络核查，未确认该决定本身强制要求完整固定式或集装箱式BESS整机认证。除非MoIAT或适用酋长国主管机关确认具体范围，不应假定每种固定式BESS配置均需要强制整机证书。
summary.zht: 阿聯酋產品合格評定由工業和先進技術部在聯邦層面管理，該部承接原ESMA標準和合格評定職能。對於固定式BESS，實際合規工作是確認每個進口電池、逆變器、充電器、控制器、外殼、電纜或其他電氣子組件是否屬於需要阿聯酋合格評定路徑的受管產品。本條將阿聯酋內閣決定2020年第10號理解為《太陽能產品控制體系》；經網絡核查，未確認該決定本身強制要求完整固定式或集裝箱式BESS整機認證。除非MoIAT或適用酋長國主管機關確認具體範圍，不應假定每種固定式BESS配置均需要強制整機證書。

standards_or_laws: MoIAT conformity assessment services for regulated products
UAE Cabinet Decision No. 10 of 2020 — Control System for Solar Products (solar-product scope; not confirmed here as a complete stationary/containerized BESS mandate)
UAE Cabinet and technical regulations applicable to specific electrical products
Former ESMA conformity functions now administered by MoIAT

summary.en: China commonly relies on product-specific CCC where the item is listed in the CCC catalogue and on GB or GB/T technical standards for stationary energy storage. China documentation may support technical review, but it does not replace UAE regulated-product scope confirmation or any Emirates conformity assessment required for imported components.
summary.zh: 中国通常对列入CCC目录的产品适用产品类别强制认证，并对固定式储能采用GB或GB/T技术标准。中国文件可支持技术审查，但不能替代阿联酋受管产品范围确认或进口组件所需的阿联酋合格评定。
summary.zht: 中國通常對列入CCC目錄的產品適用產品類別強制認證，並對固定式儲能採用GB或GB/T技術標準。中國文件可支持技術審查，但不能替代阿聯酋受管產品範圍確認或進口組件所需的阿聯酋合格評定。

standards_or_laws: CCC catalogue for China domestic regulated products

gap.en: The key gap is scope mapping. Exporters should map the bill of materials and HS codes to UAE regulated-product lists, confirm whether MoIAT conformity certification or Emirates Quality Mark treatment applies to any component, and avoid representing Chinese CCC, CQC, CE, CB, or GB reports as automatic UAE approval. Do not cite Cabinet Decision No. 10 of 2020 as a whole-BESS mandate unless MoIAT or the authority having jurisdiction confirms that the complete unit falls within a current regulated-product scope.
gap.zh: 关键差距在于适用范围映射。出口商应将物料清单和HS编码对应至阿联酋受管产品清单，确认任何组件是否需要MoIAT合格认证或阿联酋质量标志处理，并避免将中国CCC、CQC、CE、CB或GB报告表述为自动取得阿联酋批准。除非MoIAT或有管辖权的主管机关确认完整整机落入当前受管产品范围，否则不要将内阁决定2020年第10号表述为整机BESS强制要求依据。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距在於適用範圍映射。出口商應將物料清單和HS編碼對應至阿聯酋受管產品清單，確認任何組件是否需要MoIAT合格認證或阿聯酋品質標誌處理，並避免將中國CCC、CQC、CE、CB或GB報告表述為自動取得阿聯酋批准。除非MoIAT或有管轄權的主管機關確認完整整機落入當前受管產品範圍，否則不要將內閣決定2020年第10號表述為整機BESS強制要求依據。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — mandatory only for products and components confirmed within an applicable UAE regulated-product scope; Cabinet Decision No. 10 of 2020 appears solar-product scoped and is not confirmed here as a complete stationary/containerized BESS unit mandate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only for products listed in the China CCC catalogue; GB/GB/T standards may be mandatory or recommended depending on the standard and use case

source.publisher: UAE Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat UAE conformity as a scope-confirmation exercise for each BESS component and imported product category. UAE Cabinet Decision No. 10 of 2020 should not be used to claim a blanket mandatory whole-unit ESMA/MoIAT certificate for stationary or containerized BESS unless the current MoIAT or emirate authority route confirms that exact scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将阿联酋合格评定视为针对每个BESS组件和进口产品类别的适用范围确认工作。除非现行MoIAT或酋长国主管机关路径确认该具体范围，否则不应使用阿联酋内阁决定2020年第10号来声称固定式或集装箱式BESS存在强制整机ESMA/MoIAT证书要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將阿聯酋合格評定視為針對每個BESS組件和進口產品類別的適用範圍確認工作。除非現行MoIAT或酋長國主管機關路徑確認該具體範圍，否則不應使用阿聯酋內閣決定2020年第10號來聲稱固定式或集裝箱式BESS存在強制整機ESMA/MoIAT證書要求。
